title: Floating Rocks Near Temple of the Ancestor Monks (Jerall Mountains)
environment:
Game version: v0.411.140.0
Platform: PC / Windows 11 / Steam
Device: NVIDIA GTX 3060, 32GB RAM
Internet connection: Stable WiFi
steps:
1. launch game 
2. travel to oblivion gates near frostcrag spire
3. head towards temple of the ancestor monks through the jerall mountains
4. climb up toward higher mountains peaks
5. Observe rock placements along the steep terrain
expected: Rocks should appear naturally integrated into the terrain, with no visible separation or floating.
actual: Several rock meshes appear to be floating above the terrain surface, suggesting incorrect placement or lack of collision alignment.
notes:
Rocks at lower elevations appear correctly placed. However, when viewed from above (near the mountain ridge), several rocks become visibly detached from the surface and exhibit clipping or floating behavior.
Graphic settings: Ultra preset, no mods installed

title: Fathis Ules does not offer bartering option after heroes promotion in thieves guild
environment:
Game version: v0.411.140.0
Platform: PC / Windows 11 / Steam
Device: NVIDIA GTX 3060, 32GB RAM
Internet connection: Stable WiFi
steps:
1. launch game 
2. Reach master thief rank or higher in thieves guild 
3. Receive confirmation from Gray Fox that Fathis Ules is your new fence
4. Travel to imperial city and locate Fathis Ules
5. Initiate conversation with him
expected: Fathis Ules should recognize the player’s Thieves Guild status and allow bartering through the fence system. A “Barter” dialogue option should be available.
actual: Although Fathis Ules confirm his role as the Thieves Guild fence, the Barter option is not available making it impossible to sell stolen goods to him
notes:
Waiting in-game time does not trigger the bartering option
exiting and re-entering the area does not resolve the issue
no mods or external tools are used
